BUG-1001.document: login page crashes expired jwt token login page crashes expired jwt token login page crashes expired jwt token when user tries log expired json web token application throws unhandled nullpointerexception displays 500 internal server error page instead redirecting login screen steps open application chrome wait jwt token expire manually set expired token click any authenticated page observe crash expected application detect expired token clear session redirect user login page friendly message actual application crashes 500 internal server error stack trace shows nullpointerexception authservice validatetoken 142

metadata.title: Login page crashes with expired JWT token
metadata.description: When a user tries to log in with an expired JSON Web Token, the application throws an unhandled NullPointerException and displays a 500 Internal Server Error page instead of redirecting to the login s

BUG-1002.document: user authentication fails when token expires user authentication fails when token expires user authentication fails when token expires authentication system handle expired tokens properly users see blank white page when session token expires during active use steps log into application leave browser idle 30 minutes try navigate dashboard page goes blank expected graceful session expiration redirect login page session expired message actual blank white page no error message console shows uncaught typeerror cannot read property token null

metadata.title: User authentication fails when token expires
metadata.description: Authentication system does not handle expired tokens properly. Users see a blank white page when their session token expires during active use.

BUG-1003.document: dashboard performance degradation large datasets dashboard performance degradation large datasets dashboard performance degradation large datasets main dashboard takes over 15 seconds load when there more than 10 000 records database ui becomes unresponsive users cannot interact any elements steps ensure database 10000 records navigate dashboard observe load time ui responsiveness expected dashboard load within seconds pagination lazy loading large datasets actual dashboard takes 15-20 seconds load ui freezes during loading no pagination implemented

metadata.title: Dashboard performance degradation with large datasets
metadata.description: The main dashboard takes over 15 seconds to load when there are more than 10,000 records in the database. The UI becomes unresponsive and users cannot interact with any elements.

BUG-1004.document: slow dashboard loading many records slow dashboard loading many records slow dashboard loading many records dashboard page extremely slow when reports table large number entries page appears frozen loading spinner never completes steps load dashboard large dataset wait page render expected quick page load virtualized table rendering actual page hangs 10 seconds sometimes crashes browser tab

metadata.title: Slow dashboard loading with many records
metadata.description: Dashboard page is extremely slow when the reports table has a large number of entries. The page appears frozen and the loading spinner never completes.

BUG-1005.document: file upload fails files larger than 10mb file upload fails files larger than 10mb file upload fails files larger than 10mb when users try upload csv files larger than 10mb through data import feature upload silently fails without any error message progress bar reaches 100 file processed steps go settings data import click upload csv select csv file larger than 10mb click upload progress bar completes no data appears expected either successfully upload large files display clear file size limit error message before upload begins actual upload appears succeed progress bar reaches 100 no data imported no error message shown

metadata.title: File upload fails for files larger than 10MB
metadata.description: When users try to upload CSV files larger than 10MB through the data import feature, the upload silently fails without any error message. The progress bar reaches 100% but the file is not processed.

BUG-1006.document: email notifications sent wrong timezone email notifications sent wrong timezone email notifications sent wrong timezone automated email notifications display timestamps utc instead user configured timezone causes confusion when users receive alerts about events showing incorrect times steps set user timezone ist utc 30 trigger event sends email notification check timestamp received email expected email display timestamps user configured timezone ist actual all timestamps emails utc regardless user timezone settings

metadata.title: Email notifications sent with wrong timezone
metadata.description: Automated email notifications display timestamps in UTC instead of the user's configured timezone. This causes confusion when users receive alerts about events showing incorrect times.

BUG-1007.document: search returns no results partial matches search returns no results partial matches search returns no results partial matches global search feature only returns results exact matches searching partial words phrases returns zero results even when relevant data exists system steps navigate search bar type partial word like auth expecting results authentication authorization press enter zero results returned expected search support partial matching fuzzy search return relevant results partial queries actual zero results returned unless search query exactly matches title description

metadata.title: Search returns no results for partial matches
metadata.description: The global search feature only returns results for exact matches. Searching for partial words or phrases returns zero results even when relevant data exists in the system.

BUG-1008.document: password reset email contains broken link password reset email contains broken link password reset email contains broken link when users request password reset email receive contains link leads 404 page reset token url appears truncated steps click forgot password login page enter email address click reset link email 404 page appears expected reset link lead password reset form valid token actual link leads 404 page token url truncated 32 characters instead full 64 characters

metadata.title: Password reset email contains broken link
metadata.description: When users request a password reset, the email they receive contains a link that leads to a 404 page. The reset token in the URL appears to be truncated.

BUG-1009.document: csv export includes deleted records csv export includes deleted records csv export includes deleted records when exporting data csv format export includes records soft-deleted these records filtered out from exports steps delete some records from dashboard go export csv download csv file open check deleted records expected csv export only include active non-deleted records actual deleted records appear csv export original data

metadata.title: CSV export includes deleted records
metadata.description: When exporting data to CSV format, the export includes records that have been soft-deleted. These records should be filtered out from exports.

BUG-1010.document: mobile navigation menu doesn close after selection mobile navigation menu doesn close after selection mobile navigation menu doesn close after selection mobile devices hamburger navigation menu stays open after user selects menu item user manually tap outside menu close steps open app mobile device resize browser mobile width tap hamburger menu icon select any menu item menu stays open overlaying content expected menu automatically close after selection made actual menu remains open blocking content below

metadata.title: Mobile navigation menu doesn't close after selection
metadata.description: On mobile devices, the hamburger navigation menu stays open after the user selects a menu item. The user has to manually tap outside the menu to close it.

BUG-1011.document: jwt authentication error causes white screen jwt authentication error causes white screen jwt authentication error causes white screen authentication module throws error when processing tokens resulting completely white screen end user no error boundary catches rendering failure steps open web app if token invalid corrupted screen goes white no ui feedback all expected error boundary catch rendering failure display user-friendly error page retry options actual complete white screen no ui must manually clear cookies recover

metadata.title: JWT authentication error causes white screen
metadata.description: The authentication module throws an error when processing tokens, resulting in a completely white screen for the end user. No error boundary catches this rendering failure.

BUG-1012.document: api rate limiting enforced authenticated users api rate limiting enforced authenticated users api rate limiting enforced authenticated users authenticated api users make unlimited requests without any rate limiting caused server overload during peak hours when automated scripts bombard api steps authenticate valid api key send 1000 requests per minute all requests succeed without throttling expected rate limiting enforced 100 requests per minute per user actual no rate limiting server performance degrades under heavy load

metadata.title: API rate limiting not enforced for authenticated users
metadata.description: Authenticated API users can make unlimited requests without any rate limiting. This has caused server overload during peak hours when automated scripts bombard the API.

BUG-1013.document: data export csv contains soft-deleted entries data export csv contains soft-deleted entries data export csv contains soft-deleted entries bulk data export feature incorrectly includes entries were previously soft-deleted by users sql query filter by deleted_at column steps soft delete several records export all data as csv deleted records still appear export expected only active records appear export actual soft-deleted records included csv file

metadata.title: Data export to CSV contains soft-deleted entries
metadata.description: The bulk data export feature incorrectly includes entries that were previously soft-deleted by users. The SQL query does not filter by the deleted_at column.

BUG-1014.document: dark mode toggle breaks chart rendering dark mode toggle breaks chart rendering dark mode toggle breaks chart rendering when user switches dark mode charts analytics page fail re-render dark color scheme chart labels become invisible against dark background steps navigate analytics page toggle dark mode observe charts expected charts re-render appropriate dark mode colors actual chart labels axis text remain black color invisible against dark background

metadata.title: Dark mode toggle breaks chart rendering
metadata.description: When the user switches to dark mode, the charts on the analytics page fail to re-render with the dark color scheme. Chart labels become invisible against the dark background.

BUG-1015.document: pagination offset error filtered results pagination offset error filtered results pagination offset error filtered results when applying filters data table then navigating page results show incorrect records pagination offset calculated based unfiltered total instead filtered count steps open data table 500 records apply filter show 50 matching records click page shows records from unfiltered dataset expected pagination work correctly filtered results actual page shows records 51-100 unfiltered dataset instead records 26-50 filtered set

metadata.title: Pagination offset error on filtered results
metadata.description: When applying filters to a data table and then navigating to page 2, the results show incorrect records. The pagination offset is calculated based on the unfiltered total instead of the filtered count

BUG-1016.document: report dashboard extremely slow 50k records report dashboard extremely slow 50k records report dashboard extremely slow 50k records reporting dashboard becomes unusable when database contains approximately 50 000 more report entries main query fetches all records without any pagination data windowing steps 50k records reports table open reporting dashboard dashboard takes over 30 seconds render expected dashboard use server-side pagination load within seconds actual full table scan all data loaded into memory browser tab crashes low-memory devices

metadata.title: Report dashboard extremely slow with 50k records
metadata.description: The reporting dashboard becomes unusable when the database contains approximately 50,000 or more report entries. The main query fetches all records without any pagination or data windowing.

BUG-1017.document: webhook delivery fails silently https endpoints webhook delivery fails silently https endpoints webhook delivery fails silently https endpoints webhooks configured https urls fail deliver without any error logging system shows delivery status as pending indefinitely http endpoints work correctly steps configure webhook https url trigger event check webhook delivery status expected webhook delivered https endpoints successfully actual delivery status stays pending no error logged http webhooks work fine

metadata.title: Webhook delivery fails silently for HTTPS endpoints
metadata.description: Webhooks configured with HTTPS URLs fail to deliver without any error logging. The system shows delivery status as 'pending' indefinitely. HTTP endpoints work correctly.

BUG-1018.document: concurrent user edits overwrite each other without warning concurrent user edits overwrite each other without warning concurrent user edits overwrite each other without warning when two users edit same defect report simultaneously last save overwrites first without any conflict detection merge no warning shown either user steps user opens defect bug-100 editing user opens same defect bug-100 user saves changes user saves different changes user changes lost expected optimistic locking conflict detection prevent silent data loss actual last write wins user changes permanently lost

metadata.title: Concurrent user edits overwrite each other without warning
metadata.description: When two users edit the same defect report simultaneously, the last save overwrites the first without any conflict detection or merge. No warning is shown to either user.

BUG-1019.document: memory leak real-time notification websocket handler memory leak real-time notification websocket handler memory leak real-time notification websocket handler websocket handler real-time notifications memory leak each connected client adds event listeners never removed disconnect causing server memory grow continuously steps connect 100 websocket clients disconnect all clients monitor server memory memory decrease after disconnections expected memory released when websocket connections close actual server memory grows by 2mb per connection never frees server runs out memory after 48 hours

metadata.title: Memory leak in real-time notification WebSocket handler
metadata.description: The WebSocket handler for real-time notifications has a memory leak. Each connected client adds event listeners that are never removed on disconnect, causing server memory to grow continuously.

BUG-1020.document: password reset link broken email notifications password reset link broken email notifications password reset link broken email notifications users clicking password reset link email directed non-existent page url construction logic appends reset token incorrectly cutting half steps request password reset open email click reset link page found 404 expected password reset link direct functional reset page actual link resolves reset token abc123 where full token abc123def456 64 chars only first half included

metadata.title: Password reset link broken in email notifications
metadata.description: Users clicking the password reset link in their email are directed to a non-existent page. The URL construction logic appends the reset token incorrectly, cutting it in half.
